DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT BASEM HAMMAD'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING THE DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED; NO OPPOSITION FILED. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,077. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BASEM HAMMAD'S Motion For Order Compelling The Deposition Of Plaintiff And Request For Sanctions is granted; no opposition filed. Monetary sanctions are awarded in the amount of $1,077.
